title: YISSVIC Electric Fly Swatter Foldable Fly Zapper Killer 4000V Mosquito Bug Zapper Racket 1800mAh Rechargeable with USB-C Cable for Indoor Home Outdoor Black
bullet_points: Effective Mosquito Zapper Killer: The powerful 4000-volt grids with new improved density make insect zapping easy and efficient, targeting mosquitoes, fruit flies, and midges

2-in-1 Mosquito Control Mode: can be used as a general mosquito swatter in manual mode or zaps mosquitoes with attractant light in auto mode (Attention: fruit flies and flies are not phototaxis and cannot be attracted by the attractant light)
1800mAh Battery Capacity: This electric fly killer can be charged via a Type-C cable, with the battery indicator you can know the mosquito racket battery level at all times
Safe Design: The fly zapper racket equipped with 3-layer nets which include 2-layer protective nets to prevent accidental contact with the high-voltage grid net of the fly killer electric

Convenient 180° Foldable Design: Turn on the mosquito swatter and position it upright at a 90-degree angle. Fold it 180 degrees for easy storage in your backpack during camping trips. It can also be hung with the lanyard for a handy, space-saving solution
Note: It is recommended to use a 5V1A charger (not included) to charge this product. Excessive current may damage the charging performance of this device
